title: Notifications - Master Toggle OFF - Device updating
scenario: Verify that no notification appears when a device with a lower FW version starts a DFU update and the app is backgrounded, while the notification master toggle is OFF.
steps: 1. Go to App Settings > General > Notifications & Device Alerts.
2. Set the notification master toggle to OFF.
3. Navigate to Device Settings > Software Update.
4. Start a DFU update process on a device with a lower FW version.
5. Put the app in the background.
